title: Barnyard Buddies
description: Mod that adds some special farm animal breeds
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6278da1ae9711a1f3e02e426e01cebd0c989239c.png)

Barnyard Buddies is a mod that adds a several vanilla styled animals based on real world farm animal breeds!  Loosely inspired by the Spring to Life update, These specific breeds will spawn in certain biomes across your world alongside regular vanilla animals (they are not special skins of farm animals but their own mob). Some breeds like the Jacob's Sheep have unique features like dropping spotted wool, while others like the Hampshire Pig are similar to their vanilla counterpart in functions. Some farm animals will be species not seen in minecraft. 

Additionally, Barnyard Buddies adds several decorative blocks to the game meant for homesteads, farms & animal pens. Including: Chainlink Mesh, Barn wall blocks, Chainlink Doors, Iron Corrals and more!


At the moment only a 1.20.1 Forge & 1.21.1 Neoforge version are being worked on.

Credits:
- Marioz(Redkoopa) Head mod creator
- Tip Mischief: contributor for textures
- Coda: contriibutor for tweaking few textures
- Logo used is made using a Blockbench plugin by Ewan Howell
- This mod is made with Mcreator. 

Currently in the Mod:  (Descriptions of each animal will be given later.)
- Cochin Bantam Chicken
- Selkie Chicken
- Jacob's Sheep
- Hampshire Pig
- Clydesdale Horse
- Trader Clydesdale Horse (Creative Only ATM)
- Great Pyrenees Dog
- Manx Cat
- Coyote
- House Mouse
- Flemish Giant Rabbit

![Cochin Bantam Chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1588b7da503bfa5a34e65c1d1c8a74850de4814a.png)
